channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Postpones Highly Anticipated Starship Launch

media:content.media:description: The company said it is now eyeing Friday for another take-off attempt.

item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX postponed the highly anticipated launch of its upgraded Starship megarocket, calling off Thursday's test after multiple countdown stops and starts.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk's SpaceX postponed the highly anticipated launch of its upgraded Starship megarocket, calling off Thursday's test after multiple countdown stops and starts.

item.title: US, Iran In Intense Indirect Talks For Drafting Final Agreement: Report

media:content.media:description: The report also said that intensive mediation efforts are underway.

item.description: Iran War: According to the report, the two sides are currently exchanging messages and draft texts. An Iranian official earlier told Al Jazeera that negotiators were "very close" to reaching an understanding.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: According to the report, the two sides are currently exchanging messages and draft texts. An Iranian official earlier told Al Jazeera that negotiators were "very close" to reaching an understanding.

item.title: Trump Says Sending 5,000 US Troops To Poland

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump said Thursday he was sending 5,000 troops to Poland.

item.description: Trump said the move was based on his relationship with Poland's president Karol Nawrocki, a nationalist ally whom he said he was "proud to endorse" in elections that Nawrocki won last year.
item.content:encoded: Trump said the move was based on his relationship with Poland's president Karol Nawrocki, a nationalist ally whom he said he was "proud to endorse" in elections that Nawrocki won last year.

item.title: Iran Executes Two Men Over Armed Rebellion Charges, Links To 'Separatists'

media:content.media:description: Iran is the world's second-most prolific executioner after China, according to rights groups

item.description: Since the start of the conflict with Israel and the United States in February, Iran has ramped up executions, with many of the convicts hanged over anti-government protests that took place across Iran early this year.
item.content:encoded: Since the start of the conflict with Israel and the United States in February, Iran has ramped up executions, with many of the convicts hanged over anti-government protests that took place across Iran early this year.

item.title: SpaceX's IPO Bonus For Musk Has One Condition: A Million Humans On Mars

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk will do just fine if the IPO goes ahead in the coming weeks as planned. (File)

item.description: Musk's bonus is contingent on SpaceX's stock market value hitting targets ranging from $400 billion to $6 trillion -- along with the company moving a million people to Mars.
item.content:encoded: Musk's bonus is contingent on SpaceX's stock market value hitting targets ranging from $400 billion to $6 trillion -- along with the company moving a million people to Mars.

item.title: "Ridiculous, Unnecessary": Trump Eases Biden-Era Greenhouse Gas Curbs
item.description: Donald Trump on Thursday announced the easing of curbs on a group of powerful greenhouse gases commonly found in refrigerators and air conditioners.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump on Thursday announced the easing of curbs on a group of powerful greenhouse gases commonly found in refrigerators and air conditioners.

item.title: $50 Tickets For 1,000 New Yorkers: Mamdani's World Cup-Worthy FIFA Deal

media:content.media:description: The tickets are currently the cheapest available through FIFA's official sales process

item.description: The tickets are currently the cheapest available through FIFA's official sales process. Fans selected through the ballot will also receive free round-trip bus transport to the stadium.
item.content:encoded: The tickets are currently the cheapest available through FIFA's official sales process. Fans selected through the ballot will also receive free round-trip bus transport to the stadium.

item.title: Displaced By War, Lebanese Grandmother Feeds Thousands Of Fellow Refugees

media:content.media:description: The ongoing war between Israel and Hezbollah displaced over one million.

item.description: The ongoing war between Israel and Hezbollah displaced over one million people in the tiny country during months of cross-border fighting.
item.content:encoded: The ongoing war between Israel and Hezbollah displaced over one million people in the tiny country during months of cross-border fighting.

item.title: "Didn't Like Certain Aspects": Trump Postpones Signing AI Order

media:content.media:description: Concerns are growing about the cybersecurity risks posed by new AI systems. (File)

item.description: The order would create a voluntary framework for AI developers to engage with the US government before the public release of covered models
item.content:encoded: The order would create a voluntary framework for AI developers to engage with the US government before the public release of covered models

item.title: "Not Going To Let Them Have It": Trump Vows To Seize Uranium From Iran

media:content.media:description: Retrieving the uranium is part of Trump's central objective of his war on Iran. (File)

item.description: Iran is believed to possess about 900 pounds of highly enriched uranium, which Trump says was buried by US and Israeli airstrikes nearly a year ago.
item.content:encoded: Iran is believed to possess about 900 pounds of highly enriched uranium, which Trump says was buried by US and Israeli airstrikes nearly a year ago.

item.title: 'India Great Ally, Want To Sell As Much Energy As They'll Buy': Marco Rubio

media:content.media:description: Rubio will be in India from May 23-26 and will visit Kolkata, Agra, Jaipur and New Delhi

item.description: US Secretary of State, Marco Rubio's comments come at a time when US refineries have experienced a massive surge in Venezuelan heavy crude oil arrivals.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1102621/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US Secretary of State, Marco Rubio's comments come at a time when US refineries have experienced a massive surge in Venezuelan heavy crude oil arrivals.

item.title: Russia Hijacked Bluesky Accounts To Push Fake News On Ukraine: Report

media:content.media:description: Bluesky said it had identified and removed thousands of such posts since April

item.description: The operation targeted a wide range of users on the social media platform, from journalists and professors to artists and filmmakers, whose accounts were then used to circulate fabricated videos and fake news reports.
item.content:encoded: The operation targeted a wide range of users on the social media platform, from journalists and professors to artists and filmmakers, whose accounts were then used to circulate fabricated videos and fake news reports.

item.title: Taiwan President Says 'Happy' To Talk To Trump As US Signals Outreach

media:content.media:description: Taiwan relies heavily on US support to deter any potential Chinese attack.

item.description: Trump told reporters on Wednesday that he would speak to Lai, as the White House weighs arms sales to the democratic island.
item.content:encoded: Trump told reporters on Wednesday that he would speak to Lai, as the White House weighs arms sales to the democratic island.

item.title: 4,600-Year-Old Great Pyramid Of Giza Was Designed To Resist Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: The researchers collected seismic data from various passages and chambers built inside the pyramid.

item.description: The pyramid, during a test conducted by researchers, exhibited a remarkably homogeneous and stable structural response to the seismic vibrations despite its size and complexity.
item.content:encoded: The pyramid, during a test conducted by researchers, exhibited a remarkably homogeneous and stable structural response to the seismic vibrations despite its size and complexity.

item.title: With Direct Line To Mojtaba, This General Is New Key Player In Iran Talks

media:content.media:description: Vahidi helped shape Iran's support of militant groups across the region.

item.description: Brig. Gen. Ahmad Vahidi, who heads Iran's paramilitary Revolutionary Guard, has become a major player in formulating Iran's tough stance in negotiating a possible end to the war.
item.content:encoded: Brig. Gen. Ahmad Vahidi, who heads Iran's paramilitary Revolutionary Guard, has become a major player in formulating Iran's tough stance in negotiating a possible end to the war.

item.title: Iran Rebuilding Weapons Base Quickly, Already Producing Drones: Report

media:content.media:description: Currently, 50 per cent of Iran's drone capabilities still survive

item.description: Sources told CNN that Iran is restoring lost military strength by repairing and replacing missile positions, launch equipment, and the production lines for essential weapons systems damaged in the conflict.
item.content:encoded: Sources told CNN that Iran is restoring lost military strength by repairing and replacing missile positions, launch equipment, and the production lines for essential weapons systems damaged in the conflict.

item.title: Air France, Airbus Found Guilty Of Manslaughter In 2009 Crash That Killed 228

media:content.media:description: The ruling will be seen as significant reputational damage for both companies.

item.description: The Paris Court of Appeal ruled that the French flag carrier and Europe's leading aerospace manufacturer were "solely and entirely responsible," ordering each to pay 225,000 euros ($261,000).
item.content:encoded: The Paris Court of Appeal ruled that the French flag carrier and Europe's leading aerospace manufacturer were "solely and entirely responsible," ordering each to pay 225,000 euros ($261,000).

item.title: Sergio Gor Hints At "Big Things" In India-US Nuclear Collaboration

media:content.media:description: India's push to deepen civil nuclear ties with the US is gaining momentum

item.description: The US delegation noted that the recent enactment of the SHANTI Act, 2025, has opened up numerous opportunities for the commercial nuclear industry to work with India. Speaking
item.content:encoded: The US delegation noted that the recent enactment of the SHANTI Act, 2025, has opened up numerous opportunities for the commercial nuclear industry to work with India. Speaking

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Donald Trump Says Iran Talks "Right On The Borderline"

media:content.media:description: Trump said it would save "a lot of time, energy and lives" if Iran made a deal.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."

item.title: India, African Union Postpone New Delhi Summit Amid Ebola Outbreak

media:content.media:description: Africa has reported many cases of the deadly Ebola virus

item.description: India, African Union Postpone New Delhi Summit Amid Ebola Outbreak
item.content:encoded: India, African Union Postpone New Delhi Summit Amid Ebola Outbreak
